chain.thought: Explanation: Looking at the UK chart positions column, the single with a UK position of 24 is "you learn".

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The question asks which single had a UK chart position of 24. From the table, the UK chart positions are:
- "You Oughta Know": 22
- "Hand in My Pocket": 26
- "Ironic": 11
- "You Learn": 24
- "Head Over Feet": 7
- "All I Really Want": 59
Only "You Learn" has a UK chart position of 24.
